title: Handoff (office → home, 2026-07-13): v1.8.0+v1.8.1 released, memory loop live end to end; open board is 3 policy escalations, PR #10, VSCE_PAT, copy-race flake
context: Full-day office session shipped the automated memory model and released it. Continuing from the home machine — this record is the resume point (session-start orientation surfaces it).
decision: SHIPPED + RELEASED: npm 1.8.0 (auto-trust capture, inline escalations via hunch escalations/MCP/session-start, Hunch Memory panel v0.17.1 on Open VSX with full authority lifecycle activate/demote/withdraw/retire, self-repair for records+policies as revertable timeline moves, VS Code client certification via spawnCore fixture, EXP-03 instrument complete but run PARKED per dec_7aee2f10e0) and npm 1.8.1 (Python via MrSampson's LanguageSpec registry — charter exception dec_36a4c9cff8; SKIP_SUBJECT body override + chore(deps) regex fix from PR #6). Docs/site/READMEs/cookbook/changelog all current; both repos clean and pushed; branches pruned to main-only. HOME SETUP: git pull both repos (public + overlay), npm i -g @davesheffer/hunch@1.8.1, install extension davesheffer.hunch-vscode 0.17.1 from Open VSX. OPEN BOARD: (1) three proposed-with-proof policies await your activate/reject in the panel's ⚖ group — pol_01cf084e1e, pol_3f3aee11ad, pol_443e11b271; (2) PR #10 (Ollama provider) waits on Samson's metered-host guard, then record the con_2ce3f2a547 amendment + merge; (3) VSCE_PAT secret currently holds an Open VSX token — mint a real Azure DevOps PAT whenever MS Marketplace matters; (4) bug_b6f1abb9a6: native temp-copy race flakes under full-suite parallelism — fix direction: prune-grace-window or lock in removeStaleCopies; (5) EXP-03 bank draft waits in .hunch-private/exp03-bank if evidence is ever wanted.
consequences: Home session starts oriented: this record tops hunch now / session-start until superseded.
Supersede or accept this record once the board items are handled.
alternatives_rejected: A handoff markdown file in the repo (rejected: the graph IS the handoff channel — session-start injects it; a file would rot)
Leaving the board only in the chat transcript (rejected: transcripts do not cross machines; decisions do)
